title: cephaelis peraltae
intro: Cephaelis peraltae, also known as Peralta's Cephaelis or the Peralta's shrub, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of various alkaloids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Cephaelis peraltae include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antispasmodic agent. Cephaelis peraltae is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
